title: Orchard Toys Shopping List Memory Game - Matching and Memory Games for 3 Year Olds and Up - Kids Educational Toys and Learning Games - Children and Toddler Board Games Ages 3 to 7-2 to 4 Players
features: MEMORY MATCHING GAME: Take turns to turn over 1 of the everyday shopping item picture cards; players match the item to their shopping list or return the card face down on the table. Collect all of the items on your list to win!

ORCHARD GAMES FOR 3+ YEAR OLDS: A family favourite, this is Orchard Toys’ number 1 bestseller. The recognisable grocery items make this an ideal game for young children aged 3 to 7 years. Requires no reading. For 2 to 4 players.
SUSTAINABLE: Our matching and memory board game is made from recycled and sustainable cardboard.

DEVELOP SKILLS: Teacher tested, our shopping themed kids memory game encourages observational, matching and memory skills and promotes discussion. Ideal for parties, schools, family gatherings, and long lasting entertainment.

IN THE BOX: Our Shopping List board game for 3 year olds and up includes 32 grocery picture cards, 4 shopping lists, and 4 different coloured baskets/trolleys. Add on packs are available to increase play value.

SOCIAL SKILLS: A great way to extend your child’s learning is to ask them to recognise different items from their list and read them aloud, both whilst playing the matching & pairing card game and on trips to the supermarket!

ORCHARD TOYS: We've been making educational games and jigsaw puzzles for kids for over 50 years. Trusted by parents, schools, and childcare settings, our high quality products will stand the test of time for generations to come.
description: From the manufacturer A fun matching and memory game, this bright and colourful shopping-themed lotto game is an educational board game the whole family can enjoy! Orchard Toys Shopping List Game lets kids collect items from their shopping list to fill their trolley or basket. SIMPLE GAMEPLAY: Requires no reading. A great introductory game for children 3-7 years old. PLAY TOGETHER: Shopping List is for 2-4 players per game. EDUCATIONAL: This fun kids' board game is teacher-tested and makes learning fun. Kids will their learn matching, memory, and turn-taking skills plus more! MATCH AND WIN: A fun twist on classic memory and matching games. PREMIUM COMPONENTS: Engaging for children and durable for long-lasting enjoyment. Develops Matching & Memory Skills Players take it in turns turning over cards showing everyday items such as tomatoes and washing powder. They must match the pictures on their shopping list. Develops Observational Skills Older children can play more strategically by remembering where the cards from their shopping list have been placed. Develops Social Skills A great way to extend learning is to ask children to recognise the different grocery items from their list and read them aloud, both while playing the game and on a trip to the supermarket! HOW TO PLAY Shopping List lotto game uses quick and simple gameplay which holds children's attention! Players take it in turns to turn over cards showing everyday items, from tomatoes to washing powder to pizza. If they match the pictures on their shopping list, they are encouraged to say the item out loud and add it to their trolley. Older children can play more strategically by remembering where the cards from their list have been placed. The winner is the first player to collect all the items on their list and fill their trolley or basket! This matching and memory game features different types of quirky shopping lists, including paper ones and a tablet which children will enjoy. A great way to extend learning is to ask children to recognise the different grocery items from their list and read them aloud, both while playing the game and on a trip to the supermarket! WHAT'S INCLUDED? 2 shopping trolley's, 2 shopping baskets, 4 shopping lists, 32 item cards, 1 instruction leaflet. A BRITISH COMPANY Orchard Toys have been making educational games and jigsaws in Britain for nearly 50 years. Our emphasis is on ‘learning made fun’, meaning parents can benefit from our trusted educational values whilst children will have so much fun they’ll want to play time and time again! We are proud of our British roots, and we still design all our products at our head office in Norfolk. With a reputation for quality and durability, we pride ourselves on creating products that can withstand the wear and tear of little hands, whether this is at home, in a childcare setting, or in schools. COMMITMENT TO QUALITY We are passionate about producing high-quality products with minimal impact on our environment. All our games and jigsaws are made from recycled board and paper from sustainable sources. Sturdy, wipe-clean game and puzzle boards mean our products will stand the test of time against wear and tear and messy hands, ensuring they can be passed down through generations. EXPLORE OUR RANGE Whether your child likes dinosaurs or vehicles, fairy tales, or farm life, Orchard Toys has an engaging learning toy to match. Our toys help children learn essential skills, such as counting and maths, phonics and spelling, colours and shapes, and telling time. By ensuring every product we make meets the perfect balance between education and fun, we continue to produce games, jigsaws and colouring books that get the seal of approval from both parents and children! Shopping List Extras Fruit & Veg Shopping List Extras Clothes Match and Spell Number Bears Unicorn Fun!
